'''竏嗟-sh-k-l''' ('''kalashkeloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tubularize|tubularize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-sh-k-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tubularize|tubularize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗟-sh-k-l
|-
! Lemma
| kalashkeloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilashkeloko|thilashkeloko]] || [[word:jilashkeloko|jilashkeloko]] || [[word:shilashkeloko|shilashkeloko]] || [[word:kilashkeloko|kilashkeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulashkeloko|thuthulashkeloko]] || [[word:jujulashkeloko|jujulashkeloko]] || [[word:shushulashkeloko|shushulashkeloko]] || [[word:kukulashkeloko|kukulashkeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulashkeloko|thulashkeloko]] || [[word:julashkeloko|julashkeloko]] || [[word:shulashkeloko|shulashkeloko]] || [[word:kulashkeloko|kulashkeloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholashkeloko|tholashkeloko]] || [[word:jolashkeloko|jolashkeloko]] || [[word:sholashkeloko|sholashkeloko]] || [[word:kolashkeloko|kolashkeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦlashkeloko|thﾃｦlashkeloko]] || [[word:jﾃｦlashkeloko|jﾃｦlashkeloko]] || [[word:shﾃｦlashkeloko|shﾃｦlashkeloko]] || [[word:kﾃｦlashkeloko|kﾃｦlashkeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalashkeloko|thathalashkeloko]] || [[word:jajalashkeloko|jajalashkeloko]] || [[word:shashalashkeloko|shashalashkeloko]] || [[word:kakalashkeloko|kakalashkeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalashkeloko|thalashkeloko]] || [[word:jalashkeloko|jalashkeloko]] || [[word:shalashkeloko|shalashkeloko]] || [[word:kalashkeloko|kalashkeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalashkeloko|thalashkeloko]] || [[word:jalashkeloko|jalashkeloko]] || [[word:shalashkeloko|shalashkeloko]] || [[word:kalashkeloko|kalashkeloko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
